infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: JARVIS needs speech recognition to understand your voice commands.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: JARVIS needs microphone access for voice input.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: JARVIS needs camera access to capture images for analysis and hand gesture tracking.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: JARVIS needs photo library access to upload images.

plugins.photosPermission: JARVIS needs access to your photos to upload and analyze images.

JARVIS needs camera access for hand gesture tracking.
